value.note: Steady-state power sessions only (VI <= 1.05, VI > 0, >= 90min, power data). Negative decoupling = strong durability. Trend compares 7d vs 28d mean (+/-1% = stable). Alerts require N28>=5 (alarm) or N7>=3 AND N28>=5 (declining warning) for statistical reliability.
value.reliability_note: insufficient qualifying sessions for alert evaluation: 7d N=0 (min 3), 28d N=0 (min 5)
